Metadata.title: Prime Land For Sale | Hua Hin Soi 112 | 4 Rai 2 Ngan Chanote
Metadata.description: 4 Rai 2 Ngan flat buildable land with panoramic mountain views in Hua Hin's prestigious Soi 112 corridor. Chanote title deed. Water connection in place. ฿2,300,000/rai. General information only — not legal or financial advice. Verify all property details independently.

whyHuaHin.heroAlt: Hua Hin landscape at golden hour
whyHuaHin.title: Thailand's royal address.
whyHuaHin.subtitle: For over a century, Thailand's kings, aristocrats, and discerning international buyers have chosen Hua Hin. There's a reason.
whyHuaHin.royalTitle: Built for royalty. Chosen by the elite.
whyHuaHin.royalBody: King Rama VII built the summer palace Klai Kangwon ("Far from Worries") here in 1929. King Bhumibol Adulyadej (Rama IX) spent decades here. The royal presence shaped everything — security, infrastructure, atmosphere. This is not a party town. It never was.
whyHuaHin.golfBody: 10+ championship courses within 30 minutes, including Black Mountain Golf Club and Royal Hua Hin — Thailand's oldest golf course, established 1924 by King Rama VI. Green fees from 1,500–3,500 THB. Year-round play.
whyHuaHin.locationTitle: 200 km from Bangkok. A world away.
whyHuaHin.locationBody: 2.5 hours by car, direct train from Hua Lamphong. Hua Hin airport with regional connections. Close enough to Bangkok for business. Far enough to forget it.
whyHuaHin.vsBody: Phuket has parties. Pattaya has nightlife. Hua Hin has golf, seafood, jazz bars, and a beach that was good enough for three generations of Thai kings. The expat community here is families and retirees — people who chose quality of life over chaos.
whyHuaHin.ctaTitle: Your plot in Hua Hin's most sought-after corridor — Soi 112.
whyHuaHin.waMessage: Hi — I am interested in the Soi 112 Hua Hin land listing.

retirees.title: Retiring in Hua Hin — The American's Guide
retirees.introBody: Over 50,000 Americans live in Thailand. A growing number chose Hua Hin — quiet, royal, 2.5 hours from Bangkok, with JCI-accredited hospitals and golf year-round. Cost of living 50–60% below the US.
retirees.visaOABody: 1 year, renewable. Must be 50+. Requires proof of income ($2,000/month) or savings ($25,000 in Thai bank).
retirees.visaOXBody: Up to 10 years. Higher financial requirements.
retirees.visaLTRBody: New since 2022, up to 10 years, expanded property rights.
retirees.visaLTRLink: → Official LTR Visa portal (Board of Investment)
retirees.visaDisclaimer: Always consult a licensed Thai immigration lawyer. Visa rules change — verify current requirements independently.
retirees.visaEmbassyPrefix: US Embassy Bangkok also maintains a helpful guide for Americans:
retirees.costCheaperLabel: cheaper than equivalent US coastal town
retirees.healthBody: Bangkok Hospital Hua Hin is JCI-accredited with English-speaking doctors. San Paolo Hospital nearby. Many American retirees cite healthcare as the #1 reason they chose Hua Hin over other Thai cities.
retirees.hospitalCta: More about hospitals near the plot →
retirees.lifestyle6: 4 minutes: 7-Eleven. 10 minutes: Bluport Mall. 15 minutes: Bangkok Hospital.
retirees.ctaTitle: Build your retirement home on Soi 112.
retirees.ctaBody: 4 Rai 2 Ngan of flat Chanote land in Hua Hin's most prestigious corridor. Build your villa exactly as you want it. From $63,000/rai. Partial sale from 1 rai available.
retirees.waMessage: Hi — I am interested in the Soi 112 Hua Hin land listing for retirement.

golf.heroAlt: Majestic Creek Country Club golf course Hua Hin
golf.title: Golf — minutes from the plot
golf.subtitle: Majestic Creek Country Club & Hua Hin's golf corridor
golf.figCaption: Majestic Creek Country Club · 5 min from plot
golf.majesticBody: Prestigious country club with direct access via Route 2004 — one of the closest championship courses to the plot, making Soi 112 a genuine golf address rather than a compromise location.
golf.majesticFeatures: 27-hole course · wide fairways · caddy service · restaurant on site
golf.courseBanyanNote: ≈ 20 min · Consistently rated among Asia's top courses
golf.coursePineappleNote: ≈ 20 min · Dramatic mountain backdrop, exceptional conditioning
golf.corridorBody: Soi 112 is known locally as Hua Hin's golf corridor — a stretch where premium residential development and world-class golf coexist. For buyers who golf regularly, living here means tee times without the commute.

size.title: 4 Rai 2 Ngan — what does that mean?
size.subtitle: Understanding the Thai land measurement system
size.systemBody: Thailand uses its own traditional land measurement system. The three units you need to know are Rai, Ngan and Tarang Wa — they work together like metres and centimetres.
size.calcFootballValue: the size of a football pitch
size.buildTitle: 🏡 What can you build on 4 Rai 2 Ngan?
size.build1: • A generous private villa with large pool and tropical garden — on just 1 Rai
size.build2: • 3–4 separate building plots with room to spare
size.build3: • A boutique villa development of 4–5 homes
size.build4: • A private estate with main house, guest villa and extensive grounds
size.buildNote: For context: most plots available on Soi 112 are 1–2 Rai. At 4 Rai 2 Ngan, this plot is exceptionally large for the area.
